cost-trend-panel.name: cost-trend-panel
cost-trend-panel.description: LLM cost trends over time rendered as a stacked area or bar chart; dispatched to ITrendChartAdapter (impl: threejs)

style.title: Style
style.description: Stacked area bands or stacked bar columns.

bucket_time.description: ISO-8601 time bucket start. Ordering authority: monotonic ascending.

model_name.description: LLM model identifier, used as the series group key.

total_cost_usd.description: Total cost in USD for this model in this bucket.

displayContract.description: Stacked area chart over time. x-axis = bucket_time ascending at configured granularity. y-axis = cumulative total_cost_usd. Each series = one model_name.

emptyState.hint: Cost data appears after LLM calls are tracked

cost-by-model.name: cost-by-model
cost-by-model.description: LLM cost share per model — horizontal bars sorted by cost descending

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.llm_cost.v1 (llm_cost_aggregates). Ordering authority: aggregation_key (model_name) for display; no monotonic time ordering required for bar chart.

total_cost_usd.description: Total USD cost for this model in the projection window (031:146)

bucket_time.description: Time bucket for this cost row (031:74)

displayContract.description: Rendered guarantee: horizontal bar per model, bar length proportional to total_cost_usd, label = model_name, sorted cost descending.

bars.description: One bar per unique model_name value; sorted by total_cost_usd descending.

emptyState.hint: Cost data appears after LLM calls are tracked

cost-by-model-3d.name: cost-by-model-3d
cost-by-model-3d.description: LLM cost share per model — tilted 3D pie/doughnut with cost-proportional slice angles

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.llm_cost.v1 (llm_cost_aggregates). Same schema as cost-by-model 2D variant.

total_cost_usd.description: Total USD cost for this model (031:146)

displayContract.description: Rendered guarantee: tilted 3D pie/doughnut, one slice per model, arc proportional to total_cost_usd, slice label = model_name.

slices.description: One slice per unique model_name; sorted by total_cost_usd descending.

emptyState.hint: Cost data appears after LLM calls are tracked

cost-by-repo.name: cost-by-repo
cost-by-repo.description: LLM cost per repository as a horizontal bar chart; bars sorted by cost descending. Upstream-blocked until repo_name column is added (omnibase_infra migration 031:142).

repo_name.description: Repository name. UPSTREAM BLOCKED: column absent from llm_cost_aggregates (migration 031:142). Populated once upstream adds repo_name OR decodes from aggregation_key encoding repo:<name>.

total_cost_usd.description: Total LLM cost in USD for this repository over the projection window.

displayContract.description: Horizontal bar per repo, x-axis = repo_name, y-axis = total_cost_usd in USD, bars sorted by cost descending. Upstream-blocked empty state rendered until repo_name column exists in the projection.

emptyState.hint: Cost by repository appears after repo_name is populated upstream

no-data.message: No cost records yet — cost-by-repo data appears after LLM calls are tracked.

upstream-blocked.message: repo_name column is absent from llm_cost_aggregates (omnibase_infra migration 031:142). Widget renders once upstream adds repo_name or standardises on aggregation_key encoding.

delegation-metrics.name: delegation-metrics
delegation-metrics.description: Task delegation events, model breakdown, cost savings, and quality gate pass rates; dimension config switches between flat 2D donut and tilted 3D doughnut

dimension.title: Dimension
dimension.description: Render as a flat 2D SVG donut or a tilted 3D doughnut scene.

qualityGateThreshold.title: Quality gate threshold
qualityGateThreshold.description: Pass-rate at or above which the Quality Gate Pass Rate stat reads green. Below this, it reads warn-amber.

emptyState.hint: Delegation events appear when tasks are delegated to agents

routing-decision-table.name: routing-decision-table
routing-decision-table.description: LLM routing decision log with agreement rates and confidence scores; renders via IDataTableAdapter (DataTableThreeJs)

pageSize.title: Rows per page
pageSize.description: How many decisions to render per page before pagination controls.

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.delegation.decisions.v1 (migration 065_create_llm_routing_decisions.sql). Ordering authority: created_at DESC (monotonic_field).

llm_agent.description: Agent selected by the LLM router.

fuzzy_agent.description: Top agent from deterministic fuzzy matching.

agreement.description: True when LLM and fuzzy candidates agree.

provider.description: UPSTREAM-BLOCKED: LLM provider name. Not yet emitted by omnimarket node_projection_delegation. Follow-up required.

model.description: UPSTREAM-BLOCKED: Model identifier used for routing. Not yet emitted by omnimarket. Follow-up required.

reason.description: UPSTREAM-BLOCKED: Human-readable routing rationale. Not yet emitted by omnimarket. Follow-up required.

selection_mode.description: UPSTREAM-BLOCKED: Routing strategy (e.g. SEMANTIC, RULE_BASED, FALLBACK). Not yet emitted by omnimarket. Follow-up required.

fallback.description: UPSTREAM-BLOCKED: Fallback agent or strategy used when primary routing fails. Not yet emitted by omnimarket. Follow-up required.

displayContract.description: Tabular layout rendered by IDataTableAdapter (DataTableThreeJs). Sort, paginate, and search controls present. Columns: created_at, provider, model, reason, selection_mode, fallback, llm_agent, fuzzy_agent, agreement, llm_confidence, fuzzy_confidence, cost_usd. Upstream-blocked columns (provider, model, reason, selection_mode, fallback) render headers with empty cells — no fallback literal.

emptyState.hint: Routing decisions appear when LLM routing is active

baselines-roi-card.name: baselines-roi-card
baselines-roi-card.description: Token/time delta, retry counts, and promotion recommendations

emptyState.hint: Baselines data appears after A/B pattern evaluation

quality-score-panel.name: quality-score-panel
quality-score-panel.description: Pattern quality score distribution with pass-rate headline and tier-coloured bars; dimension config switches between flat 2D histogram and tilted 3D bars

dimension.title: Dimension
dimension.description: Render as a flat 2D histogram or a tilted 3D bar chart.

passThreshold.title: Pass threshold
passThreshold.description: Score at or above which a measurement is counted as passing. Drives both the headline pass-rate number and the translucent wall behind the bars.

emptyState.hint: Quality scores appear after patterns are evaluated
Run the platform readiness gate to see results

cost-summary.name: cost-summary
cost-summary.description: KPI tile cluster showing aggregate LLM spend: total cost, total savings, and total tokens over the current window; dispatched to IKPITileClusterAdapter (impl: threejs)

tiles.description: Per-tile metric configurations: field, label, format, and optional per-tile emptyState.

window.description: Aggregation window for this cost summary row.

total_cost_usd.description: Total LLM spend in USD for the window.

total_savings_usd.description: Total cost savings in USD for the window (e.g. from routing to cheaper models).

total_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed across all models for the window.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection row was materialized. Ordering authority: monotonic descending.

displayContract.description: KPI tile cluster with 3 tiles: total cost (currency USD), total savings (currency USD), total tokens (count). Honest-null per tile when projection field missing.

emptyState.hint: Cost summary appears after LLM calls are tracked. Projection is upstream-blocked until omnimarket emitter lands.

token-usage.name: token-usage
token-usage.description: Total token consumption over time as a stacked area trend; dispatched to ITrendChartAdapter (impl: threejs). Upstream blocked: omnimarket emitter + omnibase_infra snapshot path missing.

bucket_time.description: ISO-8601 time bucket start (UTC). Ordering authority: monotonic ascending.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed in this bucket across all models.

model_name.description: Optional LLM model identifier for multi-series breakdown.

displayContract.description: Stacked area chart over time. x-axis = bucket_time ascending at configured granularity (default: hour), UTC. y-axis = total_tokens. Optional series = model_name. Honest-null when no buckets.

emptyState.hint: Token usage data appears after LLM calls are tracked.

no-data.message: No token usage buckets emitted for the selected time range.

upstream-blocked.message: Token usage emitter not yet wired: total_tokens BIGINT exists in llm_cost_aggregates (migration 031:147) but the omnimarket emitter and snapshot path are not running.

event-stream.name: event-stream
event-stream.description: Live Kafka event feed with filtering and search

emptyState.hint: Events appear when the Kafka bus is connected

projection-container.name: projection-container
projection-container.description: Meta-widget that renders a VisualizationContract; dispatches to the appropriate chart adapter based on the contract definition

emptyState.hint: Projection data appears when a VisualizationContract is configured

intent-distribution.name: intent-distribution
intent-distribution.description: Horizontal bar chart showing intent category distribution across sessions — debugging, code generation, refactoring, testing, etc.

count.description: Number of intents in this category.

emptyState.hint: Intent classification data appears after session analysis runs

session-timeline.name: session-timeline
session-timeline.description: Dual-mode visualization: SVG scatter chart (time x category) and vertical timeline list for intent classification events

intent_id.description: Unique identifier for this intent event.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this intent was classified.

emptyState.hint: Timeline data appears after intent classification runs

live-event-stream.name: live-event-stream
live-event-stream.description: Real-time event feed showing events flowing through the system with type-coded badges and expandable payload details

topic.description: Kafka topic the event was published to.

payload.description: JSON-serialized event payload for detailed inspection.

emptyState.hint: Events appear when the system is actively processing

routing-decision.name: routing-decision
routing-decision.description: Live decision trace showing INPUT → CLASSIFY → ROUTE with confidence bar, routing rules table, and auto-cycling through tasks

emptyState.hint: Routing decisions appear when model routing is active

receipt-gate.name: receipt-gate
receipt-gate.description: Progressive gate reveal animation showing verification gate status per PR with pass/fail indicators, receipt manifest, and progress meter

emptyState.hint: Receipt gate appears when PRs have verification receipts

cost-savings-overview.name: cost-savings-overview
cost-savings-overview.description: Unified view of local-vs-cloud spend, per-model savings breakdown, and execution-mode rollup. Backed by cost-savings projection views composed by node_dashboard_view_composer (OMN-10346). Upstream-blocked until the composer node is deployed; renders with contract-valid fixtures.

window.title: Window
window.description: Aggregation window for cost savings rollup.

showWarnings.title: Show warnings
showWarnings.description: Display provisional / upstream-blocked warnings below the table.

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.cost.savings-overview.v1. Produced by node_dashboard_view_composer (OMN-10346). Upstream-blocked until the composer node is deployed.

total_cost_usd.description: Total actual cloud spend in USD.

total_baseline_cost_usd.description: Estimated cost if all tokens had been cloud-routed.

tokens_total.description: Total tokens processed across all models.

local_token_pct.description: Fraction of tokens routed to local models (0–1).

captured_at.description: Projection materialization timestamp. Ordering authority: monotonic DESC.

provisioned.description: True when backed by live projection data; false when using fixtures.

displayContract.description: KPI bar (cloud spend, avoided, savings rate, local token %), local-vs-cloud split bar, per-model sortable table (model, mode, tasks, tokens, cost, baseline, saved, save%), optional warnings strip, optional upstream-blocked notice.

emptyState.hint: Cost savings overview appears after node_dashboard_view_composer is deployed (OMN-10346).

upstream-blocked.message: Composer node not yet deployed — projection emitter not running. Widget renders with contract-valid fixtures until OMN-10346 is complete.

delegation-savings.name: delegation-savings
delegation-savings.description: Estimated savings vs baseline model per session and cumulative, with pricing manifest version. Backed by savings_estimates SQLite table (OMN-10623).

maxSessions.title: Max sessions
maxSessions.description: Maximum sessions to display in the table.

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.delegation.savings.v1. Backed by savings_estimates SQLite table (OMN-10623).

cumulative_savings_usd.description: Total estimated savings across all sessions in USD.

cumulative_local_cost_usd.description: Total local model cost across all sessions in USD.

cumulative_cloud_cost_usd.description: Total cloud baseline cost across all sessions in USD.

baseline_model.description: Baseline model name for savings comparison (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6).

pricing_manifest_version.description: Version of the pricing manifest used for cost estimates.

session_count.description: Number of sessions with savings data.

provisioned.description: True when backed by live projection data.

emptyState.hint: Savings data appears once delegation routing is active (OMN-10623).

delegation-model-routing.name: delegation-model-routing
delegation-model-routing.description: Which models handled which task types and at what frequency; hover a model row to see its task-type breakdown. Backed by delegation_events SQLite table (OMN-10623).

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.delegation.model-routing.v1. Backed by delegation_events SQLite table (OMN-10623).

task_types.description: Task types served by this model.

emptyState.hint: Routing data appears once delegation events are recorded (OMN-10623).

delegation-quality-gate.name: delegation-quality-gate
delegation-quality-gate.description: Pass/fail rate by check type (deterministic vs heuristic), failure categories, and escalation frequency. Backed by delegation_events SQLite table (OMN-10623).

passThreshold.title: Pass threshold
passThreshold.description: Pass rate at or above which the gate is considered passing (0–1).

showFailureCategories.title: Show failure categories
showFailureCategories.description: Show failure category breakdown below the per-check-type table.

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.delegation.quality-gate.v1. Backed by delegation_events SQLite table (OMN-10623).

overall_pass_rate.description: Fraction of all gate checks that passed (0–1).

escalation_count.description: Number of failed checks that were escalated.

escalation_rate.description: Fraction of all checks that were escalated (0–1).

emptyState.hint: Quality gate data appears once delegation events with gate checks are recorded (OMN-10623).

delegation-token-usage.name: delegation-token-usage
delegation-token-usage.description: Per-model token consumption with provenance indicator (measured/estimated/unknown) and optional estimated cost column. Backed by llm_call_metrics SQLite table (OMN-10623).

showCost.title: Show cost
showCost.description: Show estimated cost column and KPI tile.

projectionSchema.description: Row shape from onex.snapshot.projection.delegation.token-usage.v1. Backed by llm_call_metrics SQLite table (OMN-10623).

provenance_summary.description: Count of models by provenance type.

emptyState.hint: Token usage data appears once LLM call metrics are recorded (OMN-10623).

ab-compare.name: ab-compare
ab-compare.description: Per-model cost, latency, and quality comparison table from the ab-compare CLI; highlights local (free) models in green and shows cost savings summary

correlation_id.description: Unique identifier for an ab-compare run; groups all model rows together.

cost_usd.description: Total cost in USD for this model in this run. Local models emit 0.

quality.description: Quality verdict (e.g. pass, fail, or a score string).

error.description: Error message if the model call failed; empty string otherwise.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this row was materialized. Ordering authority: monotonic DESC.

displayContract.description: Table of per-model rows for the most-recent ab-compare run, sorted by cost_usd ascending. Local ($0) rows highlighted green. Savings banner below table shows max-cost minus min-cost.

rows.description: One row per model in the latest run, sorted by cost_usd ascending.

savingsBanner.description: Savings summary shown when max_cost > min_cost.

emptyState.message: No comparison data yet — run `ab-compare` CLI
emptyState.hint: Results appear after the first ab-compare run completes
